user.description: Tracy Birch, born in 2050, is a 37-year-old ride-share driver based in Hampstead who earns about £12,700 a year ferrying neighbours, tourists and late-shift workers through the leafy streets and into central London; most of her days are routine short hops, but she takes a single longer trip each year that can land her anywhere from a small town to a megacity, she trusts a few familiar apps to keep the work steady and sensible yet is pragmatically susceptible to the odd online lure—about as likely to click a suspicious link as to ignore it—so she navigates her life with the quiet caution of someone making every fare and every pound count.
